content.en:
Ye Jinpeng thought very clearly, if he lost the light group, he was afraid that he would become very ordinary, so he was unwilling to give up.

As for the incomplete strong consciousness in the origin of the eternal source thing, he really didn't dare to stay on his body, so it was naturally the best situation for the ancestor to be able to extract that strong consciousness.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to move.

The eternal rules turned into chains and drilled into Ye Jinpeng's body, and at the same time, Ye Tian urged the power of the eternal source of Wanwu Yang to suppress the mass of eternal source in Ye Jinpeng's body.

In terms of grade, the Eternal Source Origin on Ye Jinpeng's body is definitely far beyond the Yang of All Things and even far beyond the Void Mi Golden Mountain, and it is definitely from a very powerful Eternal Source Matter, but unfortunately there is only a little bit of Origin left, so there is no threat to Ye Tian.

Bang!!!!

Many eternal rules turned into a palm and grasped into the origin of the eternal source.

Ye Tian's control of the Eternal Rules could far surpass that of other invincible beings, and even far surpass many supreme beings, reaching an incredible level.

Therefore, he naturally other supreme beings may not be able to deal with Ye Jinpeng's problem, but he can handle it well.

In Ye Jinpeng's body, in the Eternal Source Origin, in an area, a consciousness finally completely awakened in a crisis situation.

Before, he only instinctively guided Ye Jinpeng to cultivate, but he didn't really wake up, after all, he was just a crippled consciousness, and his body had fallen.

But now, he had to wake up.

"Who is it?"

The mystical consciousness is extremely angry.

But when he saw Ye Tian's Eternal Rule palm grabbing towards him, he immediately panicked.

"It was discovered!"

The mystical consciousness is desperate.

He finally found a target, and he was obviously only located in a foreign world, how could he be discovered by the powerful Supreme One?

Besides, even ordinary supreme beings would find him hard!

Indeed, ordinary supreme beings may not be able to discover him, but Ye Tian condensed the Void Source Body, and he was too sensitive to the Eternal Source Origin Origin's aura, and he had too deep a deep understanding of the Eternal Rules.

In addition, Ye Jinpeng is his own junior, and he is related in blood, so he can gain insight into Ye Jinpeng's physical condition.

I have to say that this mysterious consciousness is a bit unlucky.

It's just ideology, and he doesn't have much strength, so he can't stop Ye Tian at all.

Wow!

The Eternal Rule Big Hand grabbed the mysterious consciousness out of the origin of the Eternal Source and sealed it immediately.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian said.

Ye Jinpeng felt extremely comfortable at this time, as if the mysterious light group could be completely controlled by himself, and he could also feel that he was fusing with the mysterious light group step by step.

At present, he has only fused less than 1/10,000.

"It seems that the mysterious light group was controlled by that mysterious consciousness before, and now the mysterious consciousness has been captured by the ancestor, the light group really belongs to me, the ancestor is really too powerful!" Ye Jinpeng thought to himself.

"Thank you, Ancestor!"

Ye Jinpeng said gratefully.

Ye Tian smiled slightly: "Okay, you can take a good look at the Eternal Source Origin in your body in the future, if there is any special situation, remember to inform me in time." "

"Yes, Ancestor!"

Ye Jinpeng responded.

Suddenly, Ye Tian reminded again: "The eternal source in your body tends to the soul rule system, you can major in soul rules in the future, you are now walking the path of the flesh, strictly speaking, it is not suitable." The Terran Temple has a complete soul path, and after you step into the third step of the strongest one, you can take the path of soul tribulation and use the soul tribulation realm to advance to the invincible ancestor realm. "

Ye Jinpeng's expression moved, no wonder it would be so easy for him to cultivate the Soul Secret Technique, the Soul Holy Technique, and the Ancestral Technique.

It turns out that he should take the path of the soul.

As for why the mysterious consciousness did not guide him to the path of the soul, it is estimated that the mysterious consciousness did not understand the situation, and the mysterious consciousness also took the path of the physical body, so it instinctively guided him to the path of the physical body.

"Ancestor, I understand!"

Ye Jinpeng nodded and left immediately.

After Ye Jinpeng left, Ye Tian looked at the mysterious consciousness that was sealed in his hand.

For him, the Eternal Source is not of high value, and it is this mysterious consciousness that is truly valuable.

Moreover, he was curious to know how his junior was able to merge with the origin of the Eternal Source Thing.

Void Gold Mountain.

Ye Tian came here and placed the mysterious consciousness here, otherwise without the nourishment of the eternal source of things, the mysterious consciousness would not be able to be preserved for too long.

Of course.

Even the Void Gold Mountain can't preserve the mysterious consciousness for too long, after all, the Void Gold Mountain can't preserve the incomplete consciousness.

But in a great tribulation time, he can ensure that the mysterious consciousness will not dissipate.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian entered the consciousness space of the mysterious consciousness and saw a human figure.

When this figure saw Ye Tian, he roared angrily, "You ruined my plan?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The mysterious consciousness stared at Ye Tian for a while, and said coldly: "I thought it was a powerful supreme who caught me, but I didn't expect it to be a third-class invincible? "

Ye Tian did not deny it, but continued: "Who are you, how did you make the Eternal Source Origin merge with my descendants, and which Eternal Source Origin came from?"

"I won't say anything unless you help me get back into that person and help me merge with that person, and I'll tell you everything you want to know at that time!" said the mystical consciousness.

"Your consciousness cannot survive forever, if you say it, I will continue your consciousness, but if you want to occupy the body of my descendants, it is impossible. Ye Tian refused.

The mysterious consciousness seemed to be angry, and roared again: "Do you know how difficult it is to continue consciousness? Even that mysterious eternal source object can't help me continue my consciousness all the time, I finally found a sustenance, and after endless years of searching, I found one, maybe there is no second one, but you destroy it." There is no other way to perpetuate consciousness than to merge with your juniors. "

Ye Tian was too lazy to communicate with this mysterious consciousness, and it was obviously impossible for the other party to answer any questions from him.

Now there is only one way left, and that is to forcibly strip the memory of the mysterious consciousness.

But that mysterious consciousness is very powerful, and it can be able to fall for endless years, and it can also maintain memory and reason, so you can imagine how powerful the other party was when he was alive.

Therefore, if you want to strip the other person of consciousness and let the other person have no time to annihilate themselves, there must be a special way.

"You have to trade for a soul source device that can instantly strip away the other party's consciousness!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But the soul source weapon is so precious, even many supreme beings don't have it.

"I can only choose to trade, and use the points of the Void Source Hall to reward a soul source device that can strip away the consciousness of the strong. Ye Tian decided.

The memory of a person who is at least supreme is of great value in itself, so if he does this, he will definitely not lose money in the end.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian released a message to all the Void Sons in the name of the Void Divine Son, and publicly offered a reward for collecting the Soul Source Weapon, and the price was 50,000 points.

Soon, in the Source Sea, many children of the void were shocked by this news.
